source: Statistics Canada, Canada's population clock (real-time model)
_README: Calibration snapshot for the Ooo! Pop Clock Mini (see scripts/rebase-pop-clock.mjs and src/app/components/population/README.md). enabled+population+capturedAt re-base the widget to this official reading; ratePerSecond (optional) pins the speed to StatCan own rate. The figure is read off StatCan public clock by a human -- never scraped. Snapshots older than 21 days, malformed, or future-dated are ignored automatically.
